steps.title: Spot the physical action
steps.content: The passage shows “I place my keys on the bowl” — the phrase “on the bowl” reveals the narrator is putting his keys in a specific location. That's the deciding clue.

steps.title: Match the action to the choices
steps.content: ”Put” directly expresses the action of positioning something in a location. The other choices either contradict this or describe actions unrelated to placing an object. That matches choice A — A is correct.
